content.subject: software standard
virtual observatory
data access layer
DAL
content.description: The Simple Image Access (SIA) Protocol is a protocol for retrieving image data from a variety of astronomical image repositories through a uniform interface. The interface is meant to be reasonably simple to implement by service providers. A query defining a rectangular region on the sky is used to query for candidate images. The service returns a list of candidate images formatted as a VOTable. For each candidate image an access reference URL may be used to retrieve the image. Images may be returned in a variety of formats including FITS and various graphics formats. Referenced images are often computed on the fly, e.g., as cutouts from larger images. Note that the metadata used to describe an SIA service in the registry is defined in the SimpleDALRegExt standard (ivo://www.ivoa.net/std/SimpleDALRegExt; http://www.ivoa.net/Documents/SimpleDALRegExt/).

relationship.relatedResource: SimpleDALRegExt: Describing Simple Data Access Services

param.name: POS
param.description: Search Position in the form "ra,dec" where ra and dec are given in decimal degrees in the ICRS coordinate system.

param.name: SIZE
param.description: Size of search region in the RA and Dec. directions in decimal degrees.

param.name: INTERSECT
param.description: Choice of intersection of matched images with the region of interest.

param.name: NAXIS
param.description: The number of pixels desired along each axis

param.name: CFRAME
param.description: the coordinate frame to impose on the image.

param.name: EQUINOX
param.description: the epoch of the mean equator and equinox for the specified coordinate system reference frame (CFRAME). coordinate frame to impose on the image.

param.name: CRPIX
param.description: the pixel position to locate the reference position in the output image.

param.name: CRVAL
param.description: the world coordinates of the reference position in the output image in decimal degrees

param.name: CDELT
param.description: the scale of the output image in decimal degrees per pixel

param.name: ROTANG
param.description: the rotation angle to put into the output image's coordinate system

param.name: PROJ
param.description: the projection to impose in the construction of the output image

param.name: VERB
param.description: the level of verbosity in the output.
